texto: I like how books let you into another world, but how it's secret. Like, when you read, the world you see is different from the one someone else sees when they read the same words. It's just yours.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Clare Fisher: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I like how books let you into another world, but how it's secret. Like, when you read, the world …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, all-the-good-things, reading pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reading.
